'''âr-th-h-sh''' ('''karatheshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jenny|jenny]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-th-h-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jenny|jenny]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-th-h-sh
|-
! Lemma
| karatheshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiratheshoko|thiratheshoko]] || [[word:jiratheshoko|jiratheshoko]] || [[word:shiratheshoko|shiratheshoko]] || [[word:kiratheshoko|kiratheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuratheshoko|thuthuratheshoko]] || [[word:jujuratheshoko|jujuratheshoko]] || [[word:shushuratheshoko|shushuratheshoko]] || [[word:kukuratheshoko|kukuratheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuratheshoko|thuratheshoko]] || [[word:juratheshoko|juratheshoko]] || [[word:shuratheshoko|shuratheshoko]] || [[word:kuratheshoko|kuratheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuratheshoko|thuratheshoko]] || [[word:juratheshoko|juratheshoko]] || [[word:shuratheshoko|shuratheshoko]] || [[word:kuratheshoko|kuratheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theratheshoko|theratheshoko]] || [[word:jeratheshoko|jeratheshoko]] || [[word:sheratheshoko|sheratheshoko]] || [[word:keratheshoko|keratheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoratheshoko|thothoratheshoko]] || [[word:jojoratheshoko|jojoratheshoko]] || [[word:shoshoratheshoko|shoshoratheshoko]] || [[word:kokoratheshoko|kokoratheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoratheshoko|thoratheshoko]] || [[word:joratheshoko|joratheshoko]] || [[word:shoratheshoko|shoratheshoko]] || [[word:koratheshoko|koratheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoratheshoko|thoratheshoko]] || [[word:joratheshoko|joratheshoko]] || [[word:shoratheshoko|shoratheshoko]] || [[word:koratheshoko|koratheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠratheshoko|thĂŠratheshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠratheshoko|jĂŠratheshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠratheshoko|shĂŠratheshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠratheshoko|kĂŠratheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharatheshoko|thatharatheshoko]] || [[word:jajaratheshoko|jajaratheshoko]] || [[word:shasharatheshoko|shasharatheshoko]] || [[word:kakaratheshoko|kakaratheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharatheshoko|tharatheshoko]] || [[word:jaratheshoko|jaratheshoko]] || [[word:sharatheshoko|sharatheshoko]] || [[word:karatheshoko|karatheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharatheshoko|tharatheshoko]] || [[word:jaratheshoko|jaratheshoko]] || [[word:sharatheshoko|sharatheshoko]] || [[word:karatheshoko|karatheshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
